Home / Services / Outdoor Lighting

Outdoor Lighting

Enhance your property with beautiful and functional outdoor lighting solutions.

Extend the usability and beauty of your outdoor space with our professional outdoor lighting services. We design and install custom lighting systems that enhance safety, security, and ambiance. Whether you're looking to illuminate your walkways, highlight your landscaping, or create a cozy outdoor living space, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life. Our experienced designers will work with you to create a lighting plan that meets your specific needs and budget.

We offer a wide range of outdoor lighting options, including pathway lighting, landscape lighting, accent lighting, and security lighting. We use only high-quality fixtures and energy-efficient LED bulbs to ensure long-lasting performance and low operating costs. Our outdoor lighting installations are designed to withstand the harsh Las Vegas climate, including extreme heat, intense sunlight, and occasional dust storms. We also offer maintenance and repair services to keep your outdoor lighting system running smoothly for years to come.

From initial design to final installation, we are committed to providing our customers with exceptional service and quality workmanship. We take pride in creating outdoor lighting systems that are both beautiful and functional, enhancing the value and enjoyment of your property.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Design Consultation & Site Assessment
  2. 02 Step 2: Lighting Plan Development & Fixture Selection
  3. 03 Step 3: Professional Installation & Wiring
  4. 04 Step 4: System Testing & Adjustments

Benefits

  • Increased Safety and Security
  • Enhanced Curb Appeal
  • Extended Outdoor Living Space
  • Energy Efficiency and Cost Savings

Frequently Asked Questions

What are the benefits of outdoor lighting?

Outdoor lighting increases safety, security, and curb appeal. It also allows you to enjoy your outdoor space after dark and can enhance the beauty of your landscaping.

What types of outdoor lighting are available?

We offer a wide range of outdoor lighting options, including pathway lighting, landscape lighting, accent lighting, and security lighting. We can help you choose the right lighting for your specific needs and preferences.

How much does outdoor lighting cost?

The cost of outdoor lighting depends on the size and complexity of the project. We offer free consultations and estimates to help you plan your outdoor lighting project.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with outdoor lighting? Contact us today.
